description: It is the end-of-month billing cycle, and you noticed a mistake in the timesheets for the 'Software Migration' project. The user 'junior_dev' accidentally logged work under the 'Design' activity, but this work was actually 'Development'. Correct these entries by changing the activity to 'Development' for all 'junior_dev' entries currently marked as 'Design'. Do not change time entries for any other users or the number of hours logged. Ensure no 'Design' entries remain for 'junior_dev' in this project.
